---
title: "IDL print header to a file"
date: 2011-02-02
author: Jonathan Whitmore
draft: true
description: "A short IDL code snippet showing how to extract FITS file headers and write them to an ASCII text file."
categories: [astronomy, tools]
---

Here is a snippet to grab the headers of fits files and print them into a real format like ascii.


```
openw, 1, 'Headers/2011.0101.header'
printf, 1, headfits('Raw/hires0101.fits.gz') 
close, 1
```
